mapper.select:
WITH FILTERED_OT AS ( SELECT /*+ materialize */ A.APPLY_NO, A.PERSON_ID, A.APPLY_OT_DATE, A.OT_FROM_TIME, A.OT_TO_TIME, A.APPLY_OT_REMARK, A.OT_TYPE_NO, A.OT_TYPE_CODE, A.OT_APPLY_HOUR, A.AFFIRM_FLAG, A.CONFIRM_FLAG, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATED_BY, A.CREATED_IP, A.UPDATE_DATE, A.UPDATED_BY, A.UPDATED_IP, A.ACTIVITY, A.APPLY_TIME, A.CONFIRM_DATE, A.CONFIRM_BY, A.CONFIRM_IP, A.CPNY_ID, A.BATCH_YN, A.BATCH_NO, A.DEDUCT_YN, A.SPECIAL_YN, A.OFFSET_YN, A.ADJUST_YN, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME, E.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, E.POST_GRADE_NO FROM ESS_APPLY_OT A INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID WHERE A.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND UPPER(E.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND UPPER(E.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND A.APPLY_OT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.APPLY_OT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND TO_CHAR(A.AFFIRM_FLAG) = #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_FLAG) = #{confirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), AFFIRM_AGG_DATA AS ( SELECT S.APPLY_NO, LISTAGG('

' || S.AFFIRM_LEVEL || '. ' || NVL(HE.EMPID, '') || ' - ' || NVL(HE.LOCAL_NAME, '') || '

', '') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.AFFIRM_LEVEL) AS AFFIRM_STR FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL S LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON S.AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE S.AFFIRM_LEVEL > 0 AND S.APPLY_NO IN (SELECT APPLY_NO FROM FILTERED_OT) GROUP BY S.APPLY_NO ) SELECT B.APPLY_NO AS APPLY_NO, B.PERSON_ID, B.EMPID, B.LOCAL_NAME, B.DEPT_NO, GET_DEPT_NAME(B.DEPT_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, B.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(B.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_OT_DATE, TO_CHAR(B.OT_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OT_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(B.OT_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OT_TO_TIME, B.APPLY_OT_REMARK, B.OT_TYPE_NO, B.OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(B.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(B.OT_APPLY_HOUR) AS OT_APPLY_HOUR, TO_CHAR(B.AFFIRM_FLAG) AS AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(B.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, TO_CHAR(B.CONFIRM_FLAG) AS CONFIRM_FLAG, TO_CHAR(B.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(B.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY, B.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(B.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(B.UPDATED_BY) AS UPDATED_BY, B.UPDATED_IP, B.ACTIVITY AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPLY_TIME, TO_CHAR(B.CONFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CONFIRM_DATE, B.CONFIRM_BY, B.CONFIRM_IP, B.CPNY_ID, B.BATCH_YN AS BATCH_YN, B.BATCH_NO AS BATCH_NO, B.DEDUCT_YN AS DEDUCT_YN, B.SPECIAL_YN AS SPECIAL_YN, B.OFFSET_YN AS OFFSET_YN, B.ADJUST_YN AS ADJUST_YN, TO_CHAR(B.OT_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DETAIL_FROM_DATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(B.OT_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DETAIL_TO_DATE_TIME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(B.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'IN') AS INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(B.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'OUT') AS OUTDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), B.CPNY_ID, B.PERSON_ID, '30') AS OT_TOTAL_MONTH, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(TO_CHAR(B.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), B.CPNY_ID, B.PERSON_ID, '200') AS OT_TOTAL_YEAR, AGG.AFFIRM_STR FROM FILTERED_OT B LEFT JOIN AFFIRM_AGG_DATA AGG ON B.APPLY_NO = AGG.APPLY_NO ORDER BY B.CREATE_DATE DESC, B.EMPID

SELECT TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_NO) AS APPLY_NO, A.PERSON_ID, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME, E.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, GET_DEPT_NAME(E.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, E.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_OT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_OT_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.OT_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OT_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.OT_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OT_TO_TIME, A.APPLY_OT_REMARK, A.OT_TYPE_NO, A.OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(A.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.OT_APPLY_HOUR) AS OT_APPLY_HOUR, TO_CHAR(A.AFFIRM_FLAG) AS AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(A.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_FLAG) AS CONFIRM_FLAG, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(A.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY, A.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(A.UPDATED_BY) AS UPDATED_BY, A.UPDATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPLY_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CONFIRM_DATE, A.CONFIRM_BY, A.CONFIRM_IP, A.CPNY_ID, TO_CHAR(A.BATCH_YN) AS BATCH_YN, TO_CHAR(A.BATCH_NO) AS BATCH_NO, TO_CHAR(A.DEDUCT_YN) AS DEDUCT_YN, TO_CHAR(A.SPECIAL_YN) AS SPECIAL_YN, TO_CHAR(A.OFFSET_YN) AS OFFSET_YN, TO_CHAR(A.ADJUST_YN) AS ADJUST_YN, TO_CHAR(A.OT_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DETAIL_FROM_DATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.OT_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DETAIL_TO_DATE_TIME, '' AS AFFIRM_STR FROM ESS_APPLY_OT A INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT O.OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(O.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, GET_OT_LENGTH_SPC( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), O.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deductYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS OT_APPLY_HOUR, #{deductYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DEDUCT_YN FROM ( SELECT GET_OT_TYPE_CODE( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), 0, 0 ) AS OT_TYPE_CODE FROM DUAL ) O

WITH OT_CODE AS ( SELECT GET_OT_TYPE_CODE( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), 0, 0 ) AS OT_TYPE_CODE FROM DUAL ), SHIFT_INFO AS ( SELECT OC.OT_TYPE_CODE, get_ar_shift_start_time( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_START, get_ar_shift_end_time( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_END FROM OT_CODE OC ), OT_TIMES AS ( SELECT SI.OT_TYPE_CODE, CASE WHEN SI.OT_TYPE_CODE = '32' THEN SI.SHIFT_END ELSE SI.SHIFT_START END AS FROM_DT, CASE WHEN SI.OT_TYPE_CODE = '32' THEN TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(SI.SHIFT_END, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') + 2/24, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) ELSE SI.SHIFT_END END AS TO_DT FROM SHIFT_INFO SI ) SELECT GET_DEPT_NAME(E.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, OT.OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(OT.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, OT.FROM_DT AS OT_FROM_TIME, OT.TO_DT AS OT_TO_TIME, CASE WHEN OT.FROM_DT IS NOT NULL AND OT.TO_DT IS NOT NULL THEN GET_OT_LENGTH_SPC( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), OT.OT_TYPE_CODE, OT.FROM_DT, OT.TO_DT, #{deductYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ELSE NULL END AS OT_APPLY_HOUR FROM HR_EMPLOYEE E CROSS JOIN OT_TIMES OT WHERE E.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ESS.DEPTNO, CASE WHEN HE.DEPTNO IS NOT NULL THEN GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ELSE '' END AS DEPT_NAME, ESS.EMPID, ESS.APPLY_NAME, ESS.APPLY_OT_DATE, ESS.OT_FROM_DATE, ESS.OT_FROM_TIME, ESS.OT_TO_DATE, ESS.OT_TO_TIME, get_ot_length_spc(get_emp_personid(ESS.EMPID, ESS.CPNY_ID), ESS.CPNY_ID, ESS.APPLY_OT_DATE, get_ot_type_code(get_emp_personid(ESS.EMPID, ESS.CPNY_ID), ESS.CPNY_ID, ESS.APPLY_OT_DATE, ESS.ADJUST_YN, ESS.SPECIAL_YN), ESS.OT_FROM_TIME, ESS.OT_TO_TIME, ESS.DEDUCT_YN) AS OT_APPLY_HOUR, ESS.APPLY_OT_REMARK, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), HE.CPNY_ID, HE.PERSON_ID, '30') AS OT_TOTAL_MONTH, DECODE(HE.OT_LIMIT, '0', 'No', '1', 'Yes') AS OT_LIMIT, ESS.UPLOAD_BY, TO_CHAR(ESS.UPLOAD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPLOAD_DATE, ESS.CPNY_ID, ESS.LINE_ID, ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, ESS.RESULT_FLAG, ESS.OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.OT_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, ESS.ADJUST_YN, ESS.SPECIAL_YN, ESS.OFFSET_YN, ESS.DEDUCT_YN FROM ESS_OT_APPLY_TB_EXCEL_TEMP ESS LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.EMPID = HE.EMPID AND ESS.CPNY_ID = HE.CPNY_ID WHERE ESS.UPLOAD_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') <> ''
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') = ''
ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LINE_ID, '^[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(ESS.LINE_ID) ELSE 99999999 END, ESS.LINE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_APPLY_OT ( APPLY_NO, PERSON_ID, APPLY_OT_DATE, OT_FROM_TIME, OT_TO_TIME, APPLY_OT_REMARK, OT_TYPE_NO, OT_TYPE_CODE, OT_APPLY_HOUR, AFFIRM_FLAG, CONFIRM_FLAG, ADJUST_YN, SPECIAL_YN, OFFSET_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TIME, CPNY_ID, BATCH_YN, DEDUCT_YN ) VALUES ( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{applyOtRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otTypeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otApplyHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0, 0, 0, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, SYSDATE, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ESS_APPLY_OT SET PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_OT_DATE = TO_DATE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), OT_FROM_TIME = TO_DATE(#{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), OT_TO_TIME = TO_DATE(#{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), APPLY_OT_REMARK = #{applyOtRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OT_TYPE_NO = #{otTypeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OT_TYPE_CODE = #{otTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OT_APPLY_HOUR = #{otApplyHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AFFIRM_FLAG = #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONFIRM_FLAG = 0, CONFIRM_DATE = NULL, CONFIRM_BY = NULL, CONFIRM_IP = NULL, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = 1, APPLY_TIME = SYSDATE, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE ESS_APPLY_OT SET ACTIVITY = 1, AFFIRM_FLAG = 14014310, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT SY.APPLY_NO, SY.APPLY_TYPE, SY.APPLY_FLAG FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL SY WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL SY2 WHERE SY.APPLY_NO = SY2.APPLY_NO AND SY.APPLY_TYPE = SY2.APPLY_TYPE AND SY.APPLY_FLAG = SY2.APPLY_FLAG AND SY2.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND ROWNUM < 2
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ESS_APPLY_OT WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM AR_APPLY_RESULT WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT AR_GET_OT_CLASH( '', #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '' ) FROM DUAL

SELECT GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '30') AS OT_TOTAL_MONTH, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(REPLACE(#{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '/'), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '200') AS OT_TOTAL_YEAR FROM DUAL
